zn_pi.name: Ziegler and Nichols - Process reaction (Page 23)
zn_pi.advantages: Simple to calculate, ideal for heavily lag-dominant processes. Provides highly aggressive setpoint tracking.
zn_pi.disadvantages: Designed for a quarter-decay ratio, inherently causing ~25% overshoot. Highly unstable if the dead-time ratio approaches 1.0.

cc_pi.name: Cohen and Coon - Process reaction (Page 23)
cc_pi.advantages: Incorporates dead time directly into the mathematical structure. Better load rejection for processes where delay is significant.
cc_pi.disadvantages: High proportional gain leads to aggressive valve action and unavoidable mechanical oscillation.

murrill_itae_reg.name: Performance Index Minimisation (Regulator) - Minimum ITAE Murrill (Page 25)
murrill_itae_reg.advantages: Mathematically minimizes the Integral of Time-weighted Absolute Error for load disturbances. Eliminates slow, rolling oscillations.
murrill_itae_reg.disadvantages: Complex exponential math requires precise modeling. Less effective for tracking new setpoint changes.

rovira_itae_servo.name: Performance Index Minimisation (Servo) - Minimum ITAE Rovira (Page 26)
rovira_itae_servo.advantages: Optimized specifically for setpoint changes (servo tuning). Smoothly tracks new targets with minimal time-weighted absolute error.
rovira_itae_servo.disadvantages: Slower initial response time compared to heuristic methods. Degrades if the process dead-time shifts during operation.

rovira_iae_servo.name: Performance Index Minimisation (Servo) - Minimum IAE Rovira (Page 26)
rovira_iae_servo.advantages: Minimizes the Integral of Absolute Error for servo tracking. Provides a faster initial rise time than the ITAE method.
rovira_iae_servo.disadvantages: Because it doesn't penalize time as heavily, it allows slightly more initial oscillation than ITAE before settling.

zhuang_ise_servo.name: Performance Index Minimisation (Servo) - Minimum ISE Zhuang & Atherton (Page 26)
zhuang_ise_servo.advantages: Minimizes squared errors, heavily penalizing large initial deviations from the setpoint.
zhuang_ise_servo.disadvantages: Can result in aggressive initial control action, potentially causing valve wear.
